title: FNAF UNO CARDS PACK Five Nights At Freddy's
description:
UNO FNAF!
GET FULL PACK OF UNO Five Nights At Freddy's CARDS COLLECTION
(52 cards)
body:
# Five Nights At Freddy's UNO pack !
 **Unique Cards!** 

**YOU CAN GET ALL 52 CARDS UNO FNAF TO PLAY WITH FRIENDS OR USING THEM AS A DECOR !**
![All beauty cards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff03cf7c00f64a90cb487166c97ea61bfea97db2.png)

_**Obtaineble through renamingpaper on an Anvil**_

Renaming be like:

" BlueUno0 " - for Blue card with number zero. 

" YellowBlockUno " - for yellow block card .

" ChangeUno " - for wild card that can chancge color .

" RedPlus2Uno " - for red +2 card.

" PLUS_4_UNO " - for +4 wild card .

" ReverseUnoRY " - reverse card that has 2 colors: Yellow and Red

" ReverseUnoBG " - reverse card that has 2 colors: Blue and Green

**Can be held in both hands and can be placed in item frame!**

For it to work you need OR OptiFine OR CIT resewn mod OR playing on new snapshots or 1.21.5

**THERE IS ALSO upcoming DATAPACK VERSION FOR THIS RESOURCEPACK(look in my profile), WHERE YOU CAN EASILY OBTAIN CARDS THROUGH STONECUTTER !**

This pack was fully made by msMisterR in 2023 - 2025. _was done entirely by myself_
